children.html: Find the general solution of each differential equation.

2) \tan y = x + C
y = \tan^{-1} (x + C)

3) e^y = 3e^x + C
y = \ln (3e^x + C) 4) \frac{e^{2y}}{2} = x^2 + C_1
\frac{e^{2y}}{2} = x^2 - \frac{3}{2} y = \frac{\ln(2x^2 - 3)}{2}, x > \frac{\sqrt{6}}{2} 11) \frac{e^{2y}}{2} = x^3 - \frac{1}{2} y = \frac{\ln(2x^3 - 1)}{2}, x > \frac{\sqrt[3]{4}}{2}
Find the general solution of each differential equation.

3) e^y = 3e^x + C
y = \ln (3e^x + C) 4) \frac{e^{2y}}{2} = x^2 + C_1

4) \frac{e^{2y}}{2} = x^2 + C_1
y = \frac{\ln(2x^2 + C)}{2}
\frac{e^{2y}}{2} = x^2 - \frac{3}{2} y = \frac{\ln(2x^2 - 3)}{2}, x > \frac{\sqrt{6}}{2} 11) \frac{e^{2y}}{2} = x^3 - \frac{1}{2} y = \frac{\ln(2x^3 - 1)}{2}, x > \frac{\sqrt[3]{4}}{2}
